note: Indicative catalog for B2B quotation only. No public pricing. Final maker/model confirmation required from vessel nameplate.

products.name: ABB AF50-30-11 3-Pole Contactor
products.shortDescription: 3-pole AC/DC wide-band coil contactor, 50A AC-3 rating, ideal for pump and compressor starters.
products.longDescription:
The ABB AF50-30-11 is a 3-pole contactor with an electronically controlled coil that accepts 100-250V AC/DC, eliminating the need to stock multiple coil variants across vessel switchboards. Rated 50A at AC-3 (motor switching) and 100A at AC-1 (resistive), it is widely used on cargo pump starters, HVAC compressors, hydraulic power pack motors, and bow thruster auxiliary starters.

Common failure modes include welded main contacts after repeated short-circuit interruption, and coil failure due to harmonic distortion from VFD-fed circuits. When replacing, verify the auxiliary contact arrangement (1NO+1NC standard) and surge-suppression accessories. Direct retrofit for older A-line A50-30 contactors but requires updated mounting consideration on DIN-rail panels.

Fully compliant with IEC 60947-4-1 and approved by major class societies (DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV) when supplied with marine declaration.
products.deliveryEstimate: 24-48h to Istanbul/Pendik, 48-72h to US East Coast ports
products.imageHint: Studio shot of black 3-pole industrial contactor with silver terminals, top view on white seamless background.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Schneider TeSys D LC1D18BD Contactor
products.shortDescription: TeSys D series 3-pole contactor, 18A AC-3, 24V DC coil — workhorse for galley and HVAC starters.
products.longDescription:
The Schneider LC1D18BD is part of the proven TeSys D family, configured with a 24V DC coil and 18A AC-3 (7.5kW @ 400V) rating. Found in countless engine-room motor control centers, galley equipment starters, and air-handling unit panels onboard merchant vessels.

Replacement tips: the D-frame footprint is identical to older Telemecanique LC1-D18 contactors, so retrofits are straightforward. Watch for chattering coils on vessels with weak 24V DC distribution — measure coil voltage under load. The auxiliary contact block (LADN11 etc.) is field-installable and not included by default.

Approved to IEC 60947-4-1 and IEC 60947-5-1. Marine type approval available on request from Schneider.
applications: Small fan and pump motor control
products.deliveryEstimate: 24-48h ex-Istanbul; AOG 12h available via European hub
products.imageHint: Compact black DIN-rail contactor with green Schneider label, three-quarter view, neutral grey background.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Siemens SIRIUS 3RT2026-1BB40 Power Contactor
products.shortDescription: SIRIUS S0 power contactor, 25A AC-3, 24V DC coil with screw terminals — common feeder/starter device.
products.longDescription:
The Siemens 3RT2026-1BB40 is a size S0 SIRIUS power contactor rated 25A AC-3 (11kW at 400V) with a 24V DC coil. It is one of the most widely stocked contactor footprints across European-built bulkers and tankers, found in MSBs, MCC starter buckets, and shore-power transfer panels.

The SIRIUS modular design makes it easy to add auxiliary blocks, surge suppressors, and timing relays from the same range. Common failure modes include single-phase coil burnout on undervoltage and pitted main contacts from frequent jogging — both are visible on inspection. Mechanical lifetime is rated at 30 million operating cycles.

IEC/EN 60947, UL, CSA listed; marine approvals available on request (DNV, ABS, Lloyd's).
products.deliveryEstimate: 3-5 working days ex-EU; 7-10 days CIF most ports
products.imageHint: Siemens dark-grey SIRIUS contactor with red coil terminal cover, isometric studio render.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Mitsubishi NF250-CV 3P 250A MCCB
products.shortDescription: Molded-case circuit breaker, 250A frame, 3-pole, 36kA Icu — backbone of Asian-built MSB feeders.
products.longDescription:
The Mitsubishi NF250-CV is a 250A frame molded-case circuit breaker found extensively on bulkers built in Japan, Korea, and China. It is configured as a 3-pole device with thermal-magnetic trip and 36kA breaking capacity at 380/415V. Typical applications include MSB outgoing feeders to MCC sections, large pump motor feeds, and bow thruster supply branches.

Replacement notes: the NF-CV series is a direct successor to older NF250-SP and NF250-S, but the trip curves and accessory slots differ slightly. Auxiliary contacts (AX), alarm contacts (AL), and shunt trip (SHT) coils are separate part numbers and must be ordered with the breaker. Inspect for carbon tracking and arc-chute condition during dry-docking.

Class society approvals: NK, DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV available as standard.
applications: MSB main outgoing feeders to MCC
products.deliveryEstimate: 5-10 days ex-Japan/Singapore; expedited air freight on request
products.imageHint: Beige Mitsubishi MCCB front-mounted in a panel cutout, toggle handle in OFF position, professional product photo.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Siemens SIMATIC S7-1500 Digital Input Module
products.shortDescription: 16-channel 24V DC digital input module for SIMATIC S7-1500 PLC — automation backbone module.
products.longDescription:
The 6ES7521-1BH00-0AB0 is a 16-channel sinking/sourcing 24V DC digital input module for the SIMATIC S7-1500 controller family. On vessels, this module typically scans status signals from limit switches, level floats, pressure switches, and motor running contacts feeding the integrated automation system (IAS) or alarm and monitoring system (AMS).

Failure usually presents as one or more channels reading permanently high or low; this is often caused by induced voltage from long cable runs and can be diagnosed with the diagnostic LEDs on the front. Hot-swap is supported. Spare modules should be kept onboard with their front connector (6ES7592 series) pre-wired for fast change-out during PSC or class survey.

Fully integrated with TIA Portal V15 and above. Module firmware can be updated via memory card.
compatibleSystems: Vessel IAS by Praxis, Kongsberg, Consilium when Siemens-based
products.imageHint: Dark-grey Siemens S7-1500 I/O module on rack, side LEDs lit, front connector visible.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Allen-Bradley CompactLogix 5069-L306ER Controller
products.shortDescription: Compact Logix 5380 controller, 3MB user memory, dual Ethernet — used in BWMS, cargo, and HVAC skids.
products.longDescription:
The Allen-Bradley 5069-L306ER is a Compact 5380 standard controller with 3 MB user memory, embedded dual Ethernet/IP ports for DLR ring topology, and support for up to 31 local 5069 I/O modules. It is widely deployed on vessel-installed skids — ballast water management system (BWMS) reactors, inert gas generators (IGG), nitrogen membrane skids, and reefer container monitoring.

Replacement requires an SD card with the application program; ensure backup is taken before swap. The L306ER's CIP Security feature should be reviewed against the vessel's IACS UR E26/E27 cybersecurity requirements. Common fault is Ethernet port LED stuck red, usually traced to ring topology misconfiguration after a switch replacement.

Compatible with Studio 5000 Logix Designer v32 and later.
compatibleSystems: Vendor-specific BWMS by Optimarin, Alfa Laval, Wartsila
products.deliveryEstimate: 2-3 weeks lead time; expedited 5-7 days via US channel
products.imageHint: White and red Allen-Bradley controller block mounted on DIN rail with dual RJ45 connectors visible.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Omron NX1P2-9024DT Machine Automation Controller
products.shortDescription: Compact machine controller with 14 DI / 10 DO, EtherCAT master, EtherNet/IP — auxiliary skid automation.
products.longDescription:
The Omron NX1P2-9024DT is a compact machine automation controller combining motion control, sequence logic, and connectivity in a single unit. Onboard it has 14 digital inputs and 10 transistor outputs, plus an EtherCAT master port for slave I/O expansion, and an Ethernet/IP port for SCADA integration.

Typical shipboard use is on OEM-supplied auxiliary skids — fresh water generators, oily water separators, sewage treatment plants, and provision refrigeration plants. The controller is programmed with Sysmac Studio. Failure is uncommon but battery-less retentive memory should be verified during PMS.

Note: variants exist with different I/O counts and PNP/NPN options. Always confirm the suffix (-DT for transistor sink outputs).
compatibleSystems: OEM skids by Alfa Laval, RWO, Hamworthy
products.imageHint: White Omron compact PLC with row of green status LEDs and removable terminal blocks.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Endress+Hauser Cerabar PMC71 Pressure Transmitter
products.shortDescription: Ceramic capacitive pressure transmitter, 4-20mA HART, 0-10 bar — fuel oil and lube oil service.
products.longDescription:
The Cerabar PMC71 from Endress+Hauser is a precision pressure transmitter with a ceramic capacitive sensing element, suitable for measurement of fuel oil, lube oil, fresh water, sea water, and steam pressure across a vessel. The unit provides a 4-20 mA output with overlaid HART communication, allowing remote configuration via 375/475 communicator or asset management software.

It is the de facto choice for retrofitting pressure points that previously used mechanical gauges and pneumatic transmitters. Common failure mode is membrane wear when used in dirty or particulate-laden fluids; specify the wetted material (316L SS standard, Hastelloy and tantalum optional) carefully.

Class approvals: DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV, RINA, ClassNK on request. SIL2 capable for safety-instrumented loops on inert gas or boiler systems.
applications: Main engine fuel oil supply pressure
Lube oil sump and supply pressure
products.deliveryEstimate: 1-3 weeks ex-EU; configured to nameplate spec
products.imageHint: Stainless steel pressure transmitter with red LCD display window and threaded process connection.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: VEGAPULS C 21 Compact Radar Level Sensor
products.shortDescription: 80 GHz non-contact radar level sensor, 0-15m range, Bluetooth setup — ballast and FW tank monitoring.
products.longDescription:
The VEGAPULS C 21 is a compact 80 GHz pulse radar level sensor with a measuring range up to 15 meters. With a small focused beam (8 degrees) and IP68 housing, it is ideal for ballast tanks, fresh water tanks, sludge tanks, and oily bilge wells onboard merchant vessels.

Setup is performed wirelessly via Bluetooth and the VEGA Tools app — no need to open a hot work permit to access the head. Output is 4-20 mA two-wire, with optional Modbus/HART. The radar principle is unaffected by tank atmosphere, condensation, or sloshing, which makes it a strong upgrade over float-based and ultrasonic sensors that historically fouled on heavy-fuel residue.

Built-in echo curve diagnostics simplify commissioning. Class approvals: DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV.
products.imageHint: Compact plastic radar sensor with G1.5 threaded mount and small antenna nose, top-down product photo.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Pt100 RTD Temperature Probe, Marine Duty
products.shortDescription: Pt100 4-wire RTD with thermowell, 1/3 DIN class B, suited to engine and lube/cooling water service.
products.longDescription:
Standard Pt100 4-wire RTD assembly with stainless steel thermowell for installation in main and auxiliary engine cooling water lines, jacket water, lube oil galleries, and steam condensate returns. Class B / 1/3 DIN accuracy is sufficient for engine alarm and trip duty per IACS UR M35.

The sensor's tip length, insertion depth, and process connection (G1/2 or NPT 1/2) are the critical parameters to confirm against the original maker manual. The transmitter head can host a Rosemount 644 or PR Electronics 5331 4-20 mA head transmitter for direct connection to the AMS.

Common failure mode is mechanical fracture of the lead wires at the head terminations; specify spring-loaded inserts where vibration is heavy (turbocharger drains, exhaust manifolds).
products.deliveryEstimate: 24-48h to Pendik; 3-5 days CIF major ports
products.imageHint: Stainless steel temperature probe with aluminum junction head and threaded process connection.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Hawk Acoustic Wave Vibration Sensor
products.shortDescription: Acoustic wave vibration sensor for early bearing failure detection on auxiliary engines and pumps.
products.longDescription:
The Hawk Acoustic Wave AW-S series detects high-frequency acoustic emission from stressed metal surfaces, providing early warning of bearing wear, cavitation, and lubrication failure on auxiliary engines, generator sets, large pumps, and gearboxes. Unlike traditional accelerometers (10 Hz - 10 kHz), the AE bandwidth (100 kHz - 1 MHz) captures structural events that precede classical vibration symptoms by days or weeks.

The sensor outputs a 4-20 mA proportional to AE energy, easily wired to a CMS or AMS analog channel. Typical retrofit installs are on diesel generator main bearing covers, stern tube intermediate shaft bearings, and large hydraulic power packs.

The device is widely accepted for condition-based maintenance (CBM) class notations such as DNV CM and ABS CMC.
compatibleSystems: DNV CM / ABS CMC class notations
products.imageHint: Compact stainless steel cylindrical sensor with M12 connector, magnetic base option visible.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Beijer iX T7B 7-inch Marine HMI
products.shortDescription: 7-inch widescreen TFT HMI panel, Ethernet + serial, iX runtime — engine room and skid mimics.
products.longDescription:
The Beijer iX T7B is a 7-inch widescreen 800 x 480 px HMI panel with resistive touch, suited to engine control room mimics, BWMS skid panels, FWG operator interfaces, and cargo control auxiliaries. The iX runtime supports drivers for Siemens, Mitsubishi, Allen-Bradley, Modbus TCP/RTU, and IEC 60870-5-104, making it a versatile replacement for older Beijer E-series and competitor panels.

Replacement is straightforward — back up the project file (.cxp) and SD card before swapping. Common failure mode is touch-layer wear after 5+ years of constant use; resistive panels can be calibrated but worn corners should trigger replacement.

DNV, ABS, Lloyd's marine type approval available. CE, UL listed.
products.deliveryEstimate: 2-3 weeks ex-EU; expedited from Swedish stock
products.imageHint: Black-framed 7-inch industrial HMI with colorful tank mimic on screen, panel-mount installation view.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Weintek MT8071iE 7-inch HMI
products.shortDescription: 7-inch 800x480 HMI, Ethernet + RS232/485, EasyBuilder Pro — cost-effective OEM panel replacement.
products.longDescription:
The Weintek MT8071iE is a popular 7-inch HMI commonly fitted to OEM-supplied marine skids — sewage units, provision plants, hydraulic power packs, and small purifier panels. It runs the EasyBuilder Pro runtime and supports a very wide driver library, allowing it to substitute for older Pro-face GP-series, Schneider Magelis, and similar panels at a fraction of the cost.

For replacement, request the original .emtp project file from the OEM and re-load via USB or Ethernet. Touch screens are resistive; expect 5-7 year service life under continuous duty. Backup the recipe and historical trend data to USB before swapping units.

Notes: not type-approved for IBS bridge or AMS main consoles — limit use to auxiliary skids and local panels.
products.imageHint: Slim bezel 7-inch HMI showing colorful pump/tank mimic, front-facing studio shot.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Consilium Salwico CS4000 Detector Loop Card
products.shortDescription: Addressable detector loop card for Salwico CS4000 fire detection — supports 250 devices per loop.
products.longDescription:
The CS4000 detector loop card is a key element of Consilium Salwico fire detection systems used across hundreds of merchant vessels. It supports up to 250 addressable devices (smoke, heat, manual call points, sounders) on a single galvanically isolated loop. The card slides into the main fire panel rack and is hot-swappable for fault diagnosis.

Most loop card failures are precipitated by water ingress at junction boxes that corrupts the line — diagnose with a loop tester before card replacement. Always commission with the latest CS4000 panel firmware to ensure correct device addressing.

Class society approvals: DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV, RINA. SOLAS Ch.II-2 compliant. Required spare per IMO MSC.1/Circ.1432 (preventive maintenance for fire safety).
compatibleSystems: CS4000 repeater panels on bridge / ECR
products.imageHint: Green PCB Eurocard with edge connector and status LEDs, mounted in fire panel rack.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Praxis Selma Mk2 Alarm Distribution Unit
products.shortDescription: Bridge alarm distribution and BNWAS-compatible module from Praxis Mega-Guard family.
products.longDescription:
The Praxis Selma Mk2 ADU is a configurable alarm distribution unit that bridges Praxis Mega-Guard AMS/IAS with bridge alarm summary and BNWAS (Bridge Navigational Watch Alarm System) per IMO MSC.282(86). It collects engine, cargo, and navigation alarms over CAN/Ethernet and presents them at the bridge with audible/visual indication.

Replacement units must be pre-configured with the vessel's alarm logic file (.cfg) — request from Praxis service department against the vessel IMO number before replacement. The unit has internal redundancy and dual power supply inputs for emergency operation.

Class society approvals: DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV. SOLAS Ch.V Reg.19 compliant.
products.imageHint: Slate-grey 19-inch rack-mount unit with rows of indicator LEDs and labelled push buttons.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Aqua Signal Series 55 LED Masthead Light
products.shortDescription: COLREG-72 compliant LED masthead light, 225-deg sector, vessels up to 50m — direct retrofit for incandescent S55.
products.longDescription:
The Aqua Signal Series 55 masthead lantern in LED variant is a direct retrofit for legacy incandescent S55 lanterns installed on bulkers up to 50 meters length. The 225-degree forward sector is fixed in the lens, and the LED engine inside provides equivalent visibility (5 nm) at a fraction of the current draw, with a service life of 50,000+ hours.

Replacement of an incandescent unit requires only the LED engine — the lens, base, and mounting bracket remain. Verify the supply voltage (24V DC standard, 110/220V AC variants available). Always perform a photometric verification with a class surveyor after replacement, particularly on vessels under 50 m where COLREG-72 Annex I is checked at periodic survey.

Wheelmark approval per MED 2014/90/EU.
compatibleSystems: Existing Aqua Signal S55 lens housings
products.imageHint: Black anodized cylindrical navigation lantern with Fresnel lens and stainless mounting bracket, side view.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Den Haan DHR70N LED Port/Starboard Side Lights (Pair)
products.shortDescription: Red/green LED side lights, 112.5-deg sector, vessels 12-50m — heavy-duty Dutch construction.
products.longDescription:
The Den Haan Rotterdam DHR70N series side lights are sturdy bronze-housed lanterns used widely on Northern European and Mediterranean fleet bulkers and OSVs. Supplied as a matched red (port) and green (starboard) pair, each with 112.5-degree COLREG-compliant horizontal arc and 2 nm range, the LED version replaces the legacy 25 W incandescent bulb with a sealed LED engine.

Replacement notes: the entire LED engine kit drops into the existing housing without modification. Always check the dichroic filter integrity (red/green glass) when retrofitting — UV degradation can fade the color tone. Confirm voltage match with the NLP (24V DC standard).

Wheelmark / MED approved. Class society type approval on request.
applications: Side light retrofit on Dutch-built vessels
products.imageHint: Pair of bronze marine lanterns with red and green colored lenses on white background, dramatic side lighting.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: NorthStar NSB100FT Blue+ AGM Battery 12V 100Ah
products.shortDescription: 12V 100Ah AGM marine battery, deep cycle, IEC 60896 — emergency start and UPS bank service.
products.longDescription:
The NorthStar NSB100FT Blue+ is a thin-plate pure-lead (TPPL) AGM battery delivering 100 Ah at 12V with a 10-year design life. It is widely specified for vessel emergency batteries supporting GMDSS radios, emergency lighting, navigation lights, and BNWAS, as well as engine starting on smaller auxiliary diesels.

Replacement note: AGM batteries are spill-proof and require no electrolyte top-up but must not be deeply discharged below 10.5V or charged at voltages above 14.7V (float 13.5V). Verify the vessel battery charger is set to AGM profile during installation. Common failure mode is sulphation from extended low state-of-charge after long port stays without shore power.

IEC 60896-21/22 compliant. DNV, Lloyd's, ABS marine certifications available.
products.deliveryEstimate: 24-72h ex-Pendik/EU; sea freight 2 weeks to most ports
products.imageHint: Dark blue rectangular AGM battery with two top terminals and carrying strap, studio product shot.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Effekta MKI 10000 Online UPS Module
products.shortDescription: 10 kVA online double-conversion UPS, 230V AC, marine-certified — bridge and cargo control rooms.
products.longDescription:
The Effekta MKI 10000 is a 10 kVA double-conversion (true online) UPS designed for continuous protection of critical bridge electronics, cargo control room servers, and engine room automation systems. It provides zero-transfer-time backup, voltage regulation, and harmonic filtering, with internal battery banks sized for 10-30 minutes runtime.

Replacement of a UPS module typically follows battery end-of-life (5-7 years for VRLA, 10 years for lithium options). Always perform a full battery test (BSCA) before condemning the UPS itself. The unit supports SNMP network monitoring for integration with vessel CMS.

DNV, BV, Lloyd's marine certifications available. IEC 62040-3 compliant.
products.deliveryEstimate: 4-6 weeks ex-EU; configured to vessel spec
products.imageHint: Black tall UPS cabinet with LCD display and ventilation grilles, front three-quarter view.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Hawke 501/453 RAC ATEX Cable Gland (Size A)
products.shortDescription: Ex de/Ex e barrier cable gland, M20 thread — for use in hazardous zones on tankers and pump rooms.
products.longDescription:
The Hawke 501/453 RAC is a universal barrier cable gland approved for use in Zone 1 and Zone 2 hazardous areas under IECEx and ATEX schemes. It seals on both armor and inner sheath of SWA cables, with a compound barrier section preventing flame propagation along the cable. Used on tankers, chemical carriers, and pump rooms where Ex e and Ex d enclosures are installed.

Replacement note: select size A for cables up to 14.0 mm inner diameter, and ensure the entry thread (M20 standard, M25/M32 available) matches the equipment gland plate. Cleaning and re-compounding is allowed once if the original compound is intact; otherwise the entire gland must be replaced.

Approvals: IECEx, ATEX, UL, CSA, DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV.
applications: Ex e lighting fittings on deck
compatibleSystems: SWA and braided armor marine cables
products.imageHint: Nickel-plated brass cable gland with hexagonal body and barrel sealing section, close-up macro photo.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Lapp Olflex Marine FHF 4x2.5 mm2 Power Cable
products.shortDescription: Halogen-free flame-retardant marine power cable, 4-core x 2.5 mm2, IEC 60092-353 — branch and motor feed.
products.longDescription:
Olflex Marine FHF is a halogen-free, flame-retardant power and control cable compliant with IEC 60092-353 / 350 for shipboard use, certified to multiple class societies (DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV, RINA, ClassNK). The 4 x 2.5 mm2 cross-section is a typical size for sub-distribution branches, motor feeds for small fans and pumps, and lighting circuit mains.

The cable features tinned copper conductors, mica-glass barrier for fire survival, and a sheath that emits very low smoke and zero halogen during combustion — a requirement for accommodation and machinery space wiring under SOLAS Ch.II-2.

Supplied on 100 m and 500 m drums. Larger cuts to length available on request.
applications: Motor branch circuits up to 7.5 kW
products.imageHint: Coiled black marine cable on wooden drum, end cross-section visible showing four colored cores.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: ABB M3BP 132SMB4 Marine IE3 Motor 7.5 kW
products.shortDescription: IE3 cast-iron 7.5 kW 4-pole marine motor, IP55, B3 mount — for pumps, fans, and small compressors.
products.longDescription:
The ABB M3BP series is the workhorse marine motor for European-built bulkers. The 132SMB4 frame produces 7.5 kW at 1455 rpm (4-pole, 50 Hz) and is specified for ballast pumps, sanitary discharge pumps, AHU fans, and small air compressors. The cast-iron frame, IP55 protection, and marine paint system (C5-M) make it suitable for engine room and even some on-deck installations.

Replacement note: confirm the shaft height, mounting type (B3 foot-mount standard, B5/B14 flange available), and starting method (DOL up to 5.5 kW, star-delta or VFD-fed above) on the existing nameplate. Bearings are 6308/6208 ZZ standard; specify shielded vs. open with re-greasing nipples for high-duty applications.

Class society approvals: DNV, ABS, Lloyd's, BV, RINA, ClassNK.
products.deliveryEstimate: 2-4 weeks ex-FI/EE; expedited 1 week for stock frames
products.imageHint: ABB navy-blue cast-iron motor on aluminum baseplate, terminal box on top, photographic studio render.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: ebm-papst W3G300-EW02-02 Tube-Axial Fan
products.shortDescription: 300mm EC-driven tube-axial fan, 24V or 48V DC, 2500 m3/h — engine room AHU and electronics cabinet cooling.
products.longDescription:
The ebm-papst W3G300 is a 300mm tube-axial fan with an integrated EC (electronically commutated) motor providing high efficiency and infinitely variable speed control via a 0-10V signal. Onboard, it is used for electronics cabinet cooling, small AHU sections, and emergency space ventilation, where the lower noise and energy consumption versus AC induction fans matter.

Replacement is plug-and-play with the same airflow profile, but verify the control voltage (0-10V or PWM) at the EC controller side. EC motors have integrated thermal protection and run cool — bearing life is typically 60,000+ hours under continuous duty.

IEC 60092 marine-suitable design; type-approval available on request.
products.imageHint: Black 300mm axial fan with curved EC motor pod center, blade detail visible.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: ASCO Numatics 8210G094 2-Way Solenoid Valve
products.shortDescription: Brass body 3/4-inch normally closed solenoid valve, 24V DC, for fresh/sea water and air service.
products.longDescription:
The ASCO 8210G094 is one of the most universally used pilot-operated solenoid valves on shipboard auxiliary systems. The 3/4-inch brass body, normally closed configuration, and Buna-N seals make it suitable for fresh water, sea water (with caveats), compressed air, and inert gas service up to 150 psi.

On vessels, this valve is commonly fitted to hydrophore system fill lines, sanitary flush lines, deck wash isolators, and air-line lockouts on emergency generators. The 24V DC coil (suffix `094` denotes 24V DC) draws 11 W and is rated for continuous duty.

Replacement note: coils can be replaced separately (part # 099257-001 for 24V DC) without disturbing the valve body. Common failure is debris fouling the pilot orifice — install a 100-mesh strainer upstream.
applications: Air line lockout on emergency genset
products.imageHint: Brass-bodied solenoid valve with black coil and DIN connector on top, threaded ports each side.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Megger MIT525 5 kV Insulation Resistance Tester
products.shortDescription: 5 kV digital insulation resistance tester with PI/DAR — class survey and HV motor diagnostic.
products.longDescription:
The Megger MIT525 is a 5 kV portable insulation resistance tester used by ETOs and class surveyors for testing HV motors, transformers, cables, and switchboards. It measures insulation resistance up to 1 TOhm and automatically computes polarization index (PI) and dielectric absorption ratio (DAR), key parameters for assessing aging insulation on shaft generators, bow thrusters, and main switchboard bus bars.

It is supplied with rechargeable Li-ion battery (8+ hours testing), IR communication for PC download, and rugged sealed housing. Calibration interval is 12 months and a calibration certificate (UKAS-traceable) should be requested with each unit for class acceptance.

Calibration to ISO 17025 standards; calibration certificate available on request.
products.deliveryEstimate: 3-4 weeks; usually allocated to specific vessel survey
products.imageHint: Yellow rugged hand-held insulation tester with digital LCD and dual test leads.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Fluke 1587 FC Insulation Multimeter
products.shortDescription: Combined insulation tester and TRMS multimeter, 50V/100V/250V/500V/1000V test — daily ETO duty tool.
products.longDescription:
The Fluke 1587 FC is the de facto daily-use insulation tester and digital multimeter for marine ETOs, combining low-voltage insulation testing (up to 1000V), TRMS AC/DC voltage and current measurement, continuity, resistance, capacitance, and temperature in a single rugged package. The 'FC' suffix denotes Fluke Connect wireless logging via the Fluke Connect mobile app.

Onboard, it is used for LV motor and cable insulation checks during routine PMS, junction box troubleshooting, and incoming inspection of spares. The insulation test range of 0.01 MOhm to 2 GOhm covers all typical LV applications.

Calibration to ISO 17025; certificate on request. Recommended calibration interval 12 months.
products.imageHint: Yellow and grey Fluke handheld multimeter with insulation test rotary position, leads coiled around base.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Daniamant L160 Lifebuoy Self-Igniting Light
products.shortDescription: SOLAS LSA-compliant self-igniting LED lifebuoy light, water-activated, 2+ hours runtime.
products.longDescription:
The Daniamant L160 LED lifebuoy light is the global standard for self-igniting lifebuoy lighting under SOLAS LSA Code Reg.II/2.1.2. Water-activated via a saline switch, the unit provides at least 2 cd luminous intensity over 360 degrees for a minimum of 2 hours. The LED upgrade gives much longer battery shelf life than the older xenon-flash variant.

Onboard, each MOB lifebuoy on the bridge wings and main deck requires a fitted L160. Replacement triggers: battery expiry stamped on the unit (typically 3-5 years from manufacture), corrosion, or post-deployment. Class surveyors check the date stamp and serial against the vessel's LSA inventory at each annual survey.

Wheelmark / MED approved per 96/98/EC.
products.imageHint: Bright orange cylindrical lifebuoy light with brass saline contact and clear LED dome top.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Jotron Tron 60S Cat.1 EPIRB
products.shortDescription: Cospas-Sarsat 406 MHz Category 1 float-free EPIRB with GPS — primary GMDSS distress beacon.
products.longDescription:
The Jotron Tron 60S is a Cospas-Sarsat 406 MHz Category 1 float-free EPIRB with integral GPS, required equipment on all SOLAS vessels per GMDSS regulations. It is mounted in a hydrostatic release unit (HRU) on the bridge wing or monkey island and floats free if the vessel sinks below approximately 4 meters.

Replacement triggers: battery expiry every 5-6 years (date stamped on unit), HRU expiry every 2 years (separate part), or post-activation. Each replacement must be followed by a self-test and country-coded MMSI re-programming through Jotron's authorized service network.

Wheelmark / MED approved. Cospas-Sarsat certified. SOLAS Ch.IV compliant.
products.deliveryEstimate: 2-3 weeks; MMSI re-programming included via authorized service
products.imageHint: Bright yellow EPIRB beacon in red bracket with HRU, mounted on white painted bulkhead, side view.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: FCI LS8000 Thermal Level Switch
products.shortDescription: Thermal dispersion level switch for high/low alarm on fuel oil, lube oil, and bilge service.
products.longDescription:
The FCI LS8000 is a thermal-dispersion principle level switch with no moving parts, suited to high- and low-level alarm duty in fuel oil service tanks, lube oil sumps, sludge tanks, and bilge wells. The principle is robust against the foaming, sloshing, and coating problems that often defeat float and capacitance switches in HFO and dirty bilge service.

It is supplied with a 1-inch NPT or G-1 thread, 316L SS wetted parts, and either DPDT relay or 4-20 mA output. Replacement note: confirm the dry/wet calibration of the new unit before installation; a quick field validation can be done by holding the sensor in a glass of water at room temperature versus dry air.

FM, CSA, ATEX (Zone 1) approvals available.
applications: Fuel oil service tank high/low alarm
products.imageHint: Stainless steel cylindrical level switch with hex process connection and ATEX-rated junction box.
products.disclaimer: Final compatibility must be confirmed by maker/model/nameplate and vessel technical team.

products.name: Phoenix Contact UTT 2,5 Terminal Block (Pack of 50)
products.shortDescription: Screw-clamp DIN-rail terminal block, 2.5 mm2, grey — universal junction box and panel spare.
products.longDescription:
The Phoenix Contact UT 2,5 is the universal grey screw-clamp DIN-rail terminal block of choice for marine junction boxes, MCC starter buckets, and small distribution panels. Rated 24 A / 800V (industrial), it accepts conductor cross-sections from 0.14 to 4.0 mm2 (rigid) or 0.14 to 2.5 mm2 (flexible).

Sold in packs of 50 for ship's spare inventory, supplied with end plate (D-UT 2,5/10 part # 3047028) and standard fixing rail accessories. Tin-plated copper conductive parts ensure corrosion resistance in marine ambient conditions.

DNV, BV, ABS, Lloyd's marine type approvals available. IEC 60947-7-1 / UL 1059 listed.
products.imageHint: Row of grey screw-clamp terminal blocks on DIN rail, close-up macro photography.
